title: Antares (disambiguation)
content:
'''Antares''' may refer to:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Ankarres Sapphire|Antares crystal]]''', also known as '''Ankarres Sapphire''', a [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] known to possess healing powers
*'''[[Antares Draco]]''', an [[Imperial Knight]]
*'''[[Antares Draco's quarters]]'''
*'''''[[Antares Monthly Herald]]''''', a newspaper
*'''''[[Antares Six]]''''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]
*'''[[Antares system/Legends|Antares system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]
*'''[[Selia Antares]]''', a [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]

==See also==
*'''[[Anstares (disambiguation)|Anstares]]'''
